title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework for running LLMs locally with a built-in model library and simple CLI/API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, and delete models with a few lines.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style) with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and user management.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing sync/async APIs, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Conversational CLI wrapper around Ollama with chat history, prompt templates, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like plugin that uses Ollama models for local code completions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to integrate Ollama models into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama-curl
summary: Collection of copy-paste curl snippets for every Ollama API endpoint.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistence support.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile recipes for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, CodeLlama, and more.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot server that answers questions using local Ollama models and Socket-Mode.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama’s REST and streaming APIs for Phoenix/LiveView apps.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio, serde, and native streaming support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger SDK module that spins up Ollama containers in CI pipelines for LLM-powered tests.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama chat pane and can summarize notes locally.
